title: Pyrus roopiana
taxonomy: Pyrus roopiana is classified within the family Rosaceae, which includes a wide range of flowering plants commonly known as rose family or stone fruits. Pyrus roopiana is further classified as a species within the genus Pyrus, a group that comprises various species of pear trees. The genus Pyrus is closely related to other genera such as Malus, which includes apple trees. Pyrus roopiana is native to the Himalayas, and its classification is a testament to its unique botanical characteristics. The plant's classification is an essential tool for botanists and researchers studying its properties and behavior.
